channel.title: Congestion on Dyson Sphere Program Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Congestion on Dyson Sphere Program Guide

item.title: How to Prevent DSP Logistic Drone Congestion at ILS Station
item.description: You have 200 drones orbiting a single ILS while three other stations sit empty. Items that should take 10 seconds to move take 5 minutes. Your factory is running at 30% because of logistics gridlock. Drone congestion is the hidden throughput killer of DSP. If your ILS vessels are not even taking off yet, start with our ILS Setup Guide to make sure your Supply/Demand configuration and warper slots are correct before troubleshooting drone distribution.
